subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-10-25
subcodes.first_line: Here I want to bid you farewell. This meeting and assemblage are very moving. This is the last draught in the goblet!
subcodes.first_line_orig: میخواهم با شماها خدا حافظی نمایم این ملاقات و مجلس خیلی مؤثر است آخر الکأس است
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power of prayer
